final_answer:
FINAL_RESULT:
  UUID: 4332a3b8-11d2-4978-a84b-c61b07fb8126
  PREDICTED_SMILES: O=CC=C(c1cc(ccc1O)[N+](=O)[O-])c2ccc3cccc4ccc2c34
  CONFIDENCE: 0.85
  REASON_BRIEF: The NMR data support a trans-stilbene derivative with a pyrene core: aldehyde (10.13 ppm, 188.3 ppm), phenolic OH (9.14 ppm, 156.6 ppm), trans-olefin (8.60/8.50 ppm, J=15.7 Hz), and nitro group (N, 145.7 ppm). The 25 carbons and 18 DBE match the pyrene-nitrophenylacrylaldehyde structure, and the 15 aromatic/olefinic protons are consistent with pyrene (9H) and nitro-hydroxyphenyl (4H) plus the trans-olefin (2H).
